title: Cable Ties Clear 300mm X 4.8mm (100 Pack), Large Cable Ties White Nylon Zip Ties Heavy Duty with 23kg Tensile Strength, Self-Locking Plastic Tie Wraps for Home, Garden, Office
features: 4.8 MM CABLE TIES - Length of Cable Ties: 300mm; Width: 4.8 mm; Tensile Strength of Plastic White Ties: 50lbs/23kg; Color: White; Quantity: 100 pack Nylon Zip Ties; Material: UV Resistant Nylon 66.

SELF-LOCKING - SELF-LOCKING - Self-locking Design, Strong durable, easy handling.Easily tighten the white zip ties to the desired length and the self-locking teeth will keep the zip tie tightly in place.
CABLE TIES HEAVY DUTY - Tensile Strength: 50lbs/23kg; KAXIMON white cable ties are made of nylon 66 and offer a strong fixed nonslip design ensuring to be used in outdoor and indoor conditions.
WIDE USE - The cable ties can be used for home, office, garage, travel, Ideal for multi-purpose, bundling, cable management and organizational projects.

UV RESISTANT– KAXIMON clear cable ties are suitable in a variety of different conditions. The plastic cable ties will not fade or break between the temperature range of -40°C to +85 °C making them the perfect solution, hot or cold.
